message:
perf(fwc): parallelize catalog manifest loading with thread::scope

Split connector manifest loading across up to min(available_parallelism, 4)
worker threads using std::thread::scope for scoped, join-safe
parallelism. Single-manifest case still runs single-threaded to avoid
thread overhead.

New helpers: catalog_loader_worker_count(), load_connector_manifests()
Adds test catalog_loader_worker_count_caps_parallelism().

Also fixes mesh_availability_dispatch to pass Some(args.connector) to
the catalog loader — the connector arg is not optional in this context,
so wrapping in Some() ensures the single-connector filter is applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
